slots.sign: Half my CRM is leads who said 'we are not in any rush' three years ago

caption_draft.ig: They are still not in any rush. The house they liked sold in 2023.
caption_draft.x: Three years. Same house. Sold to someone else.

calibration_notes: The 'we are not in any rush' line is verbatim agent universal — every agent has this in their CRM as a 'just looking' tag from years ago. Three-year specificity makes it concrete. The sign is funny without the template (passes the plain-text test). Caption adds the sale that already happened, hammering the cost of the wait. No engagement bait, no 'change my mind?' filler — the take stands.
